##############  MN521 dataset Description########################################################
#         MN521 is a dataset of 521 Non-redundant PDB chain of MN interacting protein chains.
#         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#         PDB resolution is maximum 3 Angstrom and PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid.
#         and interaction distance (distance between MN - amino acid interaction) is 0-4.0 Angstrom.
#         There are three line in each PDB, First line is PDB ID with chain,                   
#         Second is  amino acid sequence in single letter code                                 
#         and third line is assignment of MN molecule at each amino acid residue          
#         corresponding to amino acid of respective PDB sequence, where plus (+) sign indicate 
#         the corresponding amino acid occur in  MN interacting site while sign(-) indicates      
#         non MN interacting amino acid residue.                                             
#################### Dataset Description end    ################################################
>1bjqB
ANIQSFSFKNFNSPSFILQGDATVSSGKLQLTKVKENGIPTPSSLGRAFYSSPIQIYDKSTGAVASWATSFTVKISAPSKASFADGIAFALVPVGSEPRRNGGYLGVFDSDVYNNSAQTVAVEFDTLSNSGWDPSMKHIGIDVNSIKSIATVSWDLANGENAEILITYNAATSLLVASLVHPSRRTSYILSERVDITNELPEYVSVGFSATTGLSEGYIETHDVLSWSFASKLPDDSTAEPLDLASYLVRNVL
